title: artifact-security-scan
description: Machine-written verdict from a security scan (hs:security-scan in gate mode): secrets, dependency CVEs, injection/authz gaps (STRIDE + OWASP). Verdict policy mirrors review-decision/critique-consensus: a stage that opted in passes ONLY on verdict exactly PASS — resolve the HIGH/CRITICAL findings, or accept them by re-running the scan to a PASS verdict. Enforcement is decoupled into stage-policy and ships OFF: the shipped harness/data/stage-policy.yaml lists this kind at NO stage by default (it would brick installs without the scanner); an org opts in per-stage by adding security-scan to that stage's requires. The presence gate proves a scan ran, not who ran it; actor is attribution only. Written to plans/<active-plan>/artifacts/security-scan.json.

verdict.description: PASS = no unresolved HIGH/CRITICAL findings; BLOCKED = stop. A stage that opted in requires exactly PASS

stage.description: The stage this scan gates (e.g. ship, deploy)

actor.description: resolve_actor() output of the scanning identity (attribution only)

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the scan verdict was written

findings.description: Every finding the scan surfaced; an empty list with verdict PASS means a clean scan

category.description: e.g. secret, cve, injection, authz, crypto (STRIDE/OWASP class)

tool.description: The scanner that produced the verdict (e.g. hs:security-scan); optional
